Metadata.title: Trseah Platform
Metadata.description: A trusted platform to follow government tenders and generate technical proposals with the help of AI.

Login.credentialsDescription: Enter your credentials to access your account
Login.error500: An error occurred. Please try again later.

Dashboard.welcomeBackMsg: Welcome back! Here's what's happening with your projects today.
Dashboard.revenueDesc: Monthly revenue trends over the last 6 months.
Dashboard.salesDesc: Comparison of sales across different product lines.
Dashboard.activeSessionsDesc: Daily active users and session length.
Dashboard.serviceStatusDesc: API availability over the last 30 days.
Dashboard.sessionDetailsDesc: Detailed view of user sessions per day.

Notifications.title: Notifications
Notifications.featureDesc: Check out the new analytics dashboard in your settings.
Notifications.projectDesc: Your team has updated the 'Landing Page' project.
Notifications.billingDesc: Your monthly subscription has been renewed.

Register.detailsDescription: Enter your details below to create your account

AppSidebar.notAuthorized: You are not authorized to access this page.

Search.placeholder: Type a command or search tenders, requests, vendors...

Auth.title: Manage Government Tenders and Proposals Efficiently and Easily
Auth.subtitle: A digital platform that helps companies track tenders and create technical and financial proposals efficiently and securely.
Auth.card1Desc: Track all available competitions and opportunities easily.
Auth.card2Desc: Create professional proposals powered by AI.
Auth.card3Desc: Monitor the status of requests and approvals in real-time.
Auth.card4Desc: Manage documents and regulatory requirements with ease.

verification.successDescription: Your email has been successfully verified. You can now log in.
verification.errorDescription: We couldn't verify your email address.
verification.resendDialogDescription: Enter your email address and we'll send you a new verification link.
verification.checkEmailDescription: We've sent a verification link to {email}.
verification.checkEmailInstructions: Please click the link in the email to verify your account. If you don't see it, check your spam folder.
verification.verificationEmailSent: Verification email sent! Please check your inbox.

magicLink.verifyingDescription: Please wait while we verify your secure link.
magicLink.failedDescription: We couldn't verify your magic link.

MagicLink.checkInboxDescription: We've sent a magic link to your email address. Click the link to sign in instantly.
MagicLink.cardDescription: Enter your email to receive a passwordless login link

ForgotPassword.title: Forgot Password
ForgotPassword.description: Enter your email address to receive a password reset link
ForgotPassword.successMessage: If an account exists with that email, a password reset link has been sent.

ResetPassword.title: Reset Password
ResetPassword.description: Enter your new password below to update your account
ResetPassword.successToast: Password reset successfully! You can now log in.
ResetPassword.invalidToken: The password reset link is invalid or has expired.
ResetPassword.noToken: No reset token provided. Please request a new password reset link.

validation.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters

Company.title: Company Information
Company.description: Please enter your company's core details as registered.
Company.error: An Error occurred while updating company information

Team.title: Team Members
Team.description: Add key personnel and their professional backgrounds.
Team.addAtLeastOne: Please add at least one team member
Team.error: An Error occurred while adding team member
Team.noMembersDescription: Add your key team members using the form below to showcase your company's expertise.
Team.addMembersOneByOne: Team members are added one at a time.

Projects.error: An Error occurred while adding project
Projects.addAtLeastOne: Please add at least one project
Projects.invalidDateRange: End date must be after start date
Projects.noProjectsDescription: Use the form below to add your previous projects and build your company portfolio.
Projects.addProjectsOneByOne: Projects are added one at a time.

TendersList.title: Tenders List
TendersList.subtitle: {count} active government tenders across different entities

ServiceRequests.title: New Service Request
ServiceRequests.subtitle: Request a technical proposal for a government tender
ServiceRequests.myRequestsSubtitle: Track the status of your technical proposal requests
ServiceRequests.organizationDataDesc: Verify or update your company profile information before requesting a proposal.
ServiceRequests.selectTenderDesc: Select a tender from the platform or upload an external tender.
ServiceRequests.externalDescriptionPlaceholder: Describe the scope of work and details of the external tender...
ServiceRequests.rfpDocumentPlaceholder: Upload the main tender document / RFP booklet
ServiceRequests.additionalFilesPlaceholder: Upload any supplementary documents, layouts, drawings, or forms...
ServiceRequests.reviewDesc: Verify the request details before submitting to the platform.
ServiceRequests.noRequests: No requests found. Click the button above to submit your first technical proposal request.
ServiceRequests.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this request?

errors.externalRequired: Please provide either a description or upload an RFP document.
errors.submitFailed: Failed to submit request. Please try again.
errors.loadFailed: Failed to load data. Please refresh the page.
errors.patchFailed: Failed to update organization details. Please check the inputs.
errors.activeRequestExists: You already have an active service request for this tender.

statusPage.title: Request Details
statusPage.proposalReady: Your technical proposal is being prepared
statusPage.paymentSuccess: Payment simulated successfully! Status updated to In Progress.
statusPage.paymentError: Payment simulation failed. Please try again.
statusPage.downloadInvoiceError: Failed to download invoice. Please try again.
statusPage.notFoundDesc: The request you are trying to view does not exist or you do not have permission to view it.
statusPage.invoiceReadyTitle: Service Request Invoice Ready for Payment
statusPage.invoiceReadyDesc: Please download the invoice and complete the simulated payment to initiate the proposal work.
statusPage.proposalReadyDesc: Your tailored technical proposal is being prepared. You will be notified once it is ready.

Errors.forbiddenDescription: You do not have the required permissions to access this administrative page.

AdminRequests.title: Admin Requests
AdminRequests.subtitle: Review and manage service requests submitted by companies.
AdminRequests.searchPlaceholder: Search by company name, CR, tender title, or request ID...
AdminRequests.noRequests: No requests found matching your filters.
AdminRequests.noPdfAvailable: No PDF document uploaded. Below are the tender details.
AdminRequests.adminNotesPlaceholder: Add administrative notes regarding this request here...
AdminRequests.acceptModalDescription: Set the invoice details to accept this request. The company will be notified to pay.
AdminRequests.declineModalDescription: Provide the reason for declining this request. This will be sent to the company.
AdminRequests.declineReasonPlaceholder: Explain why this request is being declined...
AdminRequests.successAccept: Request accepted and invoice generated successfully!
AdminRequests.errorAction: Failed to update request status. Please try again.
